problem.title: FAST-LIO2 on the repository-stored Istanbul sequence
problem.question: How does FAST-LIO2 perform on the repository-stored Istanbul sequence?

variants.label: Default (no IMU)
variants.intent: LiDAR-only mode; no IMU data available in KITTI Raw fixtures.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Reduce keypoint density and map window for faster LiDAR-inertial updates.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Increase keypoint density and map window for a more exhaustive LiDAR-inertial solve.
